title: Electric Fence Remote Control
short description: This signal comes from an RF remote control device that transmits in UHF over 433.92MHz and controls the arming and disarming system of an electric fence.
description:
The signal comes from a LINSEG brand electric fence security key, model PTV0009.

It has 4 buttons with different functions, each pulse runs the signal emitted around 4KHz over its center frequency, eventually with different data transmitted to its reception box of the electric fence.
